games.name: Piercing Skies
games.description: Dodge, jump, and survive under a sky of danger in Piercing Skies! Arrows rain down from above as you leap between three narrow platforms, timing each jump to avoid getting struck. Quick reflexes and sharp focus are your only defense in this fast-paced survival challenge. Every second you last adds to your score&amp;mdash;but one mistake, and its game over. Can you outlast the storm and master the art of survival beneath the piercing skies?
games.instructions: Move the block to not let the arrows hit it

games.name: Easy Coloring Kitty
games.description: Easy Coloring Kitty is a super fun and relaxing coloring game made just for kids. Get ready to bring cute kittens to life with bright colors and silly designs. Pick a picture, grab your favorite shades, and start painting. There is no right or wrong way to play: just have fun, be creative, and let your imagination run wild. Whether you like rainbow cats or classic fluffy friends, this game is all about smiles and color. Perfect for young artists who love animals and fun art time. Coloring has never been this easy or this cute!
games.instructions: Mouse to play

games.name: Doll Game DIY Fashion Star
games.description: Welcome to DIY Fashion Star, a casual DIY simulator game for girls who love fashion clothes and dressing. You need to meet customers needs and offer them your tailored clothes! Use your sense of fashion and beauty to create the best and suitable garments for every client. From selecting cloth formats to cutting and sewing, you witness how a piece of cloth transforms into a beautiful suit.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Speedboa Warer Shooting
games.description: Have you ever wanted to drive the fastest speedboat? Feel the stunt and thrill of high-speed rowing! Enjoy a nervous racing game in the Speedboat: Water Shooting. Youll pilot a speedboat in an exciting battle against the enemy in rough seas. Shoot the enemies with your gun. Feel the rush as you race at full speed across the ocean. Aim enemies, blast enemy boats out of your way, and protect yourself!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Redball Avengers
games.description: Evil minions want to squeeze the planet into a square shape. Whos got the heroballs to save the world ? Oh yeah, thats right! Be the avenger Hero to the rescue and defeat all the evil squares in this HeroBall adventure! Heroball has shown up to save the world. Collect stars and unlock new characters as AmericaBall, SpiderBall, and Ironball and save the world from the minions.
games.instructions: Use the keyboard to play

games.name: Brainrot Rescue
games.description: Brainrot Rescue is a festive puzzle game where players help Brainrot Claus retrieve his stolen gifts from mischievous snowmen. The gameplay revolves around strategically pulling pins to guide Santa safely through various obstacles, such as hot lava and icy traps, to collect presents and defeat enemies. With 30 challenging levels, players must use problem-solving skills to determine the correct sequence of pin pulls, ensuring Brainrot safe passage and the successful recovery of all gifts.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: FNF Girlfriend Multiverse Fashion
games.description: Welcome to FNF Girlfriend Multiverse Fashion. Friday Night Funkin&amp;rsquo; Girl seems bored of trying music. She has a plan for something different other than music. Yes, she wants to try multiverse fashion! Sounds fun! right? Join and pick a different fashion outfit. At each level, her wardrobe is filled with different costumes. Help them to choose the best one!
games.instructions: Left Mouse Button Click

games.name: Reveal the Animal
games.description: Reveal the Animal is a fun and educational math game where players must select fractions that add up to 1. As players correctly solve the fraction equations, they will gradually uncover a hidden animal. The game features a variety of animals and difficulty levels, making it suitable for players of all ages.
games.instructions: Click to select the fractions

games.name: Hummer Lady Queen
games.description: Hummer Lady Queen is a thrilling luck-based driving game where a bold lady takes control of a powerful hummer and smashes through boxes blocking her path! Each box holds a surprise — hit the right ones to collect money and boost your fortune, but beware: some contain danger and will cost you a life. Its a high-speed game of risk and reward, where timing, courage, and luck decide your fate. With vibrant visuals, stylish character customization, and unpredictable gameplay, every run is a new challenge. Can you stay alive, get rich, and rule the road like a true queen?
games.instructions: Use up and left or right arrow key to play game or touch screen of mobile

games.name: Cube Speed Dash
games.description: Jump, dash, and survive in Cube Speed Dash, a high-speed arcade challenge where every second counts! Master lightning-fast reflexes as you guide a nimble cube through treacherous obstacle courses filled with spikes, traps, and deadly pitfalls. One wrong move&amp;mdash;and it&amp;rsquo;s game over! Blazing-Fast Gameplay &amp;ndash; Sprint through short but intense levels designed for quick, addictive sessions. Precision Controls &amp;ndash; Simple tap-and-hold mechanics, but razor-sharp timing is key to victory. Minimalist &amp;amp; Stylish &amp;ndash; Clean neon visuals and smooth animations keep you focused on the action.
games.instructions: A Move Left D Move Right Space Jump

games.name: Jelly Connect
games.description: Jelly Connect challenges players to pair identical, squishy jellies using a path of no more than three lines. Clear the board quickly to advance. As you progress, each level becomes tougher, requiring sharper memory and strategy. The vibrant visuals and engaging puzzles make it an addictive experience for everyone.
games.instructions: Use your mouse or touchscreen to select and connect matching jellies Paths can have up to three straight lines Complete all matches within the time limit to clear the level For faster completion plan your connections ahead

games.name: Merge Master: Weapons Craft
games.description: Merge Master: Weapons Craft is a fun and addictive game where you become the ultimate weapon crafter! Start with basic tools and merge them together to create powerful swords, axes, and legendary weapons. Every merge unlocks stronger gear, helping you defeat tougher enemies and bosses. Upgrade your forge, expand your arsenal, and climb the ranks to become the master of weapon crafting. Easy to play, satisfying to merge, and full of action &amp;ndash; build your weapon empire today and show the world your forging skills!
games.instructions: Click with mouse or Touch with your phone

games.name: WW2 Frontline Defense
games.description: WW2 Frontline Defense is an idle war strategy game set during World War II. Command machine gunners defending the frontline wall against endless enemy waves. With each wave, enemies grow stronger, faster, and harder to stop. Upgrade your tower, boost game speed, activate artillery strikes, and double your income with powerful bonuses. Build an impenetrable defense and hold the line for as long as possible. Key features: Fast-paced base defense during World War II Tower upgrades and income multipliers Free and premium bonuses (artillery, x2, speed boost) Cloud saves and leaderboards 14 supported languages Play instantly in your browser
games.instructions: Enemies attack in waves - hold the line Your tower shoots automatically Earn gold for each enemy killed Upgrade the tower use bonuses speed artillery x2 income Survive as long as you can and beat your score After defeat start over with stronger

games.name: GeometryJump
games.description: Control blocks to jump forward on high platforms. Long jump with short jump, there will be a jagged chase behind, speed up the jump, avoid being defeated by the jagged, come to experience it, see how many points you can get.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Puzzledom One Line
games.description: Welcome to Puzzledom: One Line - the ultimate brain teaser you can&amp;rsquo;t stop drawing. This casual puzzle minigame looks simple, but each level is challenging. There are six ways to play here for you to choose from. For example, draw lines to help boys and girls find the proper toilet to prevent them from colliding.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Legends John Wicked
games.description: John has been urgently called to duty, but a mistake he made during the mission has put him in a dangerous situation. John Wicked is furious &amp;mdash; he&amp;rsquo;s armed himself with all his weapons and is ready for battle. Shoot all the bad guys who stand in your way and reach your car. Get in and escape the scene. The enemies are everywhere, and there are too many of them. Take them down one by one.
games.instructions: Use the WASD keys to move Shoot and defeat all incoming enemies Reach your car safely Playable on both mobile and PC

games.name: Build A Queen 2025
games.description: In Build a Queen 2025, you will embark on a fun journey to become a real queen. You will need to make your way through different platform levels with your opponents. Choose outfits, skin colors, and more according to your goals. Dress up in the most glamorous queen look, meet the prince, and win. You can collect money to unlock more dance steps.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Dirty Home Cleaning Fix
games.description: Are you a storing master? Do you always get annoyed at tidying up? Or do you feel confused about what to start with in front of a messy room? This casual cleaning girl game - Dirty Home Cleaning Fix will give solutions to all your questions! Use your wit and patience to put the messy room in order.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Blocks Stack Rush
games.description: Enjoy an addictive stacking adventure. In Blocks Stack Rush, you&amp;rsquo;ll control a little block character running and begin a fun pixelated journey. Collect blocks, stack them high and race against time to build the perfect picture. You need to align each block and keep putting together the complete picture.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Blade n Vines
games.description: Blade &amp;amp; Vines is an action-packed Amazonian battle adventure where nature itself becomes your greatest weapon! As a fierce warrior of the jungle, you must harness the power of enchanted vines and razor-sharp blades to defeat waves of enemies standing in your way. Use your unique abilities&amp;mdash;whip enemies with thorned vines, summon towering roots to block attacks, and unleash devastating blade combos to carve your path to victory. With every battle won, your powers grow stronger, unlocking new skills and strategies to dominate the jungle battlefield.
games.instructions: Keep playing

games.name: DownHill Ball
games.description: Downhill Ride challenges players to control a constantly descending ball as it navigates through tricky obstacles. Players need quick reflexes to avoid crashing while the games pace escalates. With an addictive, endless runner style, you must stay focused to travel as far as possible without colliding.
games.instructions: Use simple controls tap to move the ball left or right Your goal is to bypass obstacles and keep the ball rolling As you progress speed increases demanding sharper reflexes A helpful hint plan your moves ahead of time to dodge impending challenges

games.name: Silent Shuriken
games.description: Step into the shadows and test your reflexes in Silent Shuriken! As a swift and silent ninja, you must dodge deadly blades, spinning traps, and slicing hazards that threaten to cut you down at every turn. Collect bonus objects scattered across the battlefield to boost your score, but stay alert&amp;mdash;one wrong move and it&amp;rsquo;s all over. Only the sharpest reflexes and stealthiest moves will keep you alive in this deadly dance of steel!
games.instructions: Click to go to other side be careful to collect only fruits

games.name: Minecraft lava chicken 2
games.description: Minecraft Chicken Lava 2 is a fun and fiery spotting challenge where your mission is simple&amp;mdash;but intense: find and grab all the lava chickens hidden in each picture! These glowing, molten chickens blend into the lava-filled Minecraft landscapes, and it&amp;rsquo;s up to you to spot them all before time runs out. Each level features: Detailed Minecraft Scenes &amp;ndash; Full of lava lakes, obsidian blocks, and sneaky hiding spots. Lava Chickens &amp;ndash; Unique chickens with a fiery glow, hidden in plain sight.
games.instructions: mouse only

games.name: BouncingBall
games.description: Control the character through the ring. Avoid touching the edge of the ring, there will be some sharp traps during the movement, avoid touching the trap.Come and experience it.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Commando Shooting
games.description: Commando Shooter is an intense top-down military action game where you step into the boots of an elite soldier fighting against waves of enemies. Navigate through hostile territory, collect powerful weapons, and eliminate enemy forces in this adrenaline-pumping arcade shooter! Key Features: Fast-paced combat action with intuitive touch/mouse controls Multiple weapon systems to collect and master - from rapid-fire machine guns to devastating rocket launchers Progressive difficulty across numerous challenging levels and sectors Epic boss battles against armored vehicles, bunkers, and gunner emplacements Upgrade system to enhance your weapons,
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Car Dealer Idle
games.description: Ever dreamed of becoming a top Car Dealer? In Car Dealer Idle, you&amp;rsquo;ll manage your own vehicle business. Buy and sell cars, expand your showroom, and grow into a real tycoon. Make smart management decisions, upgrade your dealership, and watch your profits skyrocket. Unlock more booths to sell cooler vehicles. Unlock repair areas, test drive areas, etc.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Surprise Birthday Party
games.description: What can you recall in terms of the birthday party? Do you want to leave a favorite ever birthday memory? Welcome to the Surprise Birthday Party! Here is a collection of mini-games related to birthday parties, including cake cooking, dressing up, wrapping gifts, and arranging a birthday party feast! You do not want to miss any of the celebration sessions! Join and make this casual game your cozy party escape.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Shark Tralalero Tralala
games.description: Shark Tralalero Tralala is a casual arcade game about the meme Tralalelo Tralala. Play as a shark and help it find sneakers! Shark Tralalero Tralala is a casual arcade game consisting of 30 levels. Play as a shark, an Italian meme brain-mouth animal, also known as Tralalelo Tralala. Help the shark find sneakers underwater, avoiding obstacles and aggressive fish!
games.instructions: The PC version of the game is controlled by the AD keys or arrow keys larr rarr The mobile version is controlled by on-screen buttons

games.name: Rainbow Frontline
games.description: Rainbow Frontline is a fast-paced 2D pixel shooter set in a vibrant rainbow galaxy under siege! Take control of a retro spaceship, dodge falling meteors, and blast colorful alien enemies in wave-based battles. Master each levels theme&amp;mdash;from red to violet&amp;mdash;as you fight through the spectrum! You can upgrade your ship using collected coins to gain - Extra lives - Timed shield invincibility - Powerful damage boosts Core Features: *Rainbow-themed stages with unique enemies *Colorful boss fights and endless meteors *Rewarded ads for bonus coins *Simple, intuitive controls &amp;mdash; tap and fly *Track your high scores and survival
games.instructions: Control For Keyboard Arrow keys or WASD rarr Direction Control Space Key rarr Fire Control For Mobile Virtual Joystick Control

games.name: Extreme Mega Ramp Car Stunts
games.description: Get ready for the ultimate stunt-driving challenge in Mega Ramp Car Stunts! Take control of powerful cars and race down sky-high mega ramps to perform mind-blowing jumps, flips, and tricks. Defy gravity as you soar through the air and land like a pro on impossible tracks. With dynamic gameplay, extreme stunts, and intense visuals, this is the stunt arena where only the boldest drivers survive!
games.instructions: WASD or Arrow Keys

games.name: Minecraft Lava Chicken
games.description: Minecraft Lava Chicken is a fun, fast-paced hidden object game set in the pixelated world of Minecraft, where your mission is simple yet addictive: find all 10 Lava Chickens hidden in each stage before time runs out! In this unique twist on the classic find the hidden object formula, players dive into rich, colorful Minecraft-inspired scenes&amp;mdash;dense forests, deep caves, bustling villages, and even the fiery Nether. Each stage is a handcrafted Minecraft image,
games.instructions: mouse only

games.name: Pengu Pengu
games.description: Hurry up, Pengu, and collect all the fish! The penguins are very hungry and its getting harder to find food. Gather every fish and make your way to the mother penguin. Be careful &amp;mdash; polar bears and dangerous traps are everywhere. Avoid the deadly traps and reach the mother penguin and her egg. Don&amp;rsquo;t forget: collect all the fish!
games.instructions: You can move using the WASD keys Mobile controls are available Collect all the fish in the level and reach the mother penguin and her egg

games.name: Stick Up!
games.description: Let Stickman rise up high and escape from dangers and obstacles.Protect stick from swords, saws, razors and shurikens with your shield and hit new records! Clean the way with shield and reach clouds in this escape rise up game. Touch the shield and protect the ballon or the stickman will fall, collect diamonds and make up your stickman friend
games.instructions: Mouse or Touch for play

games.name: Sprunki Memory Time
games.description: Sprunki Memory Time is a fun and free online game made just for kids. Your goal is to find all the matching cards. Flip the cards one by one and remember where each picture is. When you find two that match, they disappear. Keep going until you clear the board and move on to the next level. Each level gets a little trickier, so get ready to train your memory and have lots of fun. Sprunki Memory Time is a great game to play anytime you want to relax, learn, and enjoy. Try it now and see how many levels you can finish!
games.instructions: Mouse to play

games.name: Fruit Pop it
games.description: Fruit Pop It challenges players to match and burst colorful fruit bubbles to clear each level. This addictively fun game offers a delightful mix of excitement and relaxation, with charming visuals and upbeat sounds. Conquer numerous levels and enjoy the gratifying popping sensation. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts of all ages!
games.instructions: Tap and drag to swap adjacent fruit bubbles Match three or more of the same to pop them Advance through levels by meeting specific goals or clearing the board Race against the clock or take time for strategy Hint Create combos to earn extra points a

games.name: Crazy Parking Jam  Car Jam Game
games.description: Parking Jam is a challenging puzzle game where you untangle a crowded parking lot one car at a time. Use your logic and problem-solving skills to move vehicles in the correct order, clearing the way without causing chaos. With each level, tackle increasingly complex puzzles filled with more cars and tricky obstacles. How to Play Parking Jam Everyones been stuck in a parking jam, but the real challenge is figuring out how to escape! This is a satisfying puzzle game where you click and drag cars to clear them from a crowded parking lot and onto the street.
games.instructions: Click and slightly drag the cars in the direction you want them to get out of the parking lot

games.name: Brainrot sahuuur
games.description: Are you brairot enough to survive this absurd meme quiz? Step into the world of chaotic Italian memes, pure nonsense, and 100% cooked brain cells. Each question makes less sense than the last &amp;mdash; and that&amp;rsquo;s the point. Features: Completely illogical, intentionally dumb questions Viral meme sounds and cursed images Hilarious answers that defy reason A final test to measure your true brairot level
games.instructions: mouse click

games.name: Slice And Solve
games.description: Slice &amp;amp; Solve is a fun and interactive math puzzle game that challenges you to master fractions! Slice objects into equal parts and solve fraction-based puzzles to progress through exciting levels. Whether youre learning fractions or sharpening your math skills, Slice &amp;amp; Solve makes learning both engaging and enjoyable. With increasing difficulty and clever challenges, this game is perfect for players of all ages. Can you slice your way to victory? Play now and become a fraction-solving pro!
games.instructions: Fraction you better know

games.name: TempleEscape
games.description: Control the character to avoid being chased by giant spheres and avoid various traps. During the game you can get gold, gold can be used to buy a variety of cool character skins, the game is endless gameplay, quick to see how many points you can achieve.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Summer Runway Challenge
games.description: Get ready to shine under the sun in Summer Runway Challenge, the ultimate fashion dress-up game! Show off your style by dressing models in the latest summer trends and sending them down the runway. With vibrant outfits, makeup choices, and accessories, this game is perfect for fashion lovers who want to create the perfect summer look.
games.instructions: Left Mouse Button Click or Tap to Play

games.name: Zombie Shooting King
games.description: The apocalypse is here! Hordes of zombies are swarming the streets. You are the last line of defense. Grab your gun, sharpen your shooting skills, and unleash unstoppable firepower to survive. Shoot fuel tanks, airdrops, and more to get more firepower to destroy tons of zombies. Get diamonds to upgrade your talents like Guardrail, ATK Boost, Crit Rate, or Coin earning!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Balloon Boom
games.description: Balloon Boom is an exciting color-matching arcade game where quick reflexes are the key to success! Use your colored pin to pop only the balloons that match. Each correct pop earns you points, but one wrong tap and it&amp;rsquo;s game over! The speed increases as you go, keeping the challenge alive. With bright visuals, smooth animations, and simple one-tap controls, Balloon Boom is perfect for players of all ages. How long can you survive the popping frenzy?
games.instructions: Desktop Click on the left button of the balloon that matches your pin color Mobile Tap the matching-colored balloon on the screen

games.name: Dudu Engineering Truck
games.description: DuDu Engineering Truck is a casual and puzzle game where you drive engineering trucks to finish tasks on the worksite. Use your sensitivity to shapes to construct a truck and conquer all challenges ahead. If you love car designing and car games, never miss DuDu Engineering Truck! You will enjoy an adventurous journey of being an engineer.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Ultrahero Vs Monsters Royale Battle
games.description: Ultrahero Vs Monsters Royale Battle is an action fighting game where you, as a mighty Ultrahero. Battle against waves of evil monsters in a 3D world. Every battle is a new adventure. Feel the perfect fusion of tower defense and nervous arcade action in this game. As a hero, you must not only fight off monsters in epic battles but also use tower defense tactics to protect your base.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: World Flag Quiz
games.description: World Flag Quiz is a fast-paced, fun, and educational mobile game that challenges players to match countries with their correct flags. Designed with simplicity and clarity in mind, the game offers a single, highly addictive game mode that tests your geographical knowledge one country at a time. In each round, players are presented with the name of a country &amp;mdash; such as France, Brazil, Japan, or Nigeria &amp;mdash; and must choose the correct flag from a set of four options. Only one is right, and the other three are cleverly selected to test your attention to detail and flag recognition skills.
games.instructions: mouse only

games.name: Dino run run
games.description: Experience the classic thrill of the Chrome offline dinosaur game &amp;mdash; now with a fresh new twist! Dino Run Run is a fast-paced endless runner where you dodge obstacles and rack up your high score in a minimalist desert landscape. Whether youre online or offline, the adventure never stops!
games.instructions: Computer Use the Up and Down arrow keys to jump and duck Touch Screens Swipe up to jump and swipe down to duck

games.name: Hidden Object Farm Adventure
games.description:
Play a fun hidden object game with 30 farm levels!\\\
In each level, find 6 hidden things before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint! Its easy to play and full of colorful farm fun.
games.instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to play this game

games.name: Ghost Jump
games.description: Ghost Jump has you navigating a maze as a ghost leaping through colorful challenges. Each jump tests your timing and reflexes, as you adapt to new obstacles. Quick reactions are essential to maintain your streak, making each moment a thrilling challenge in this endlessly entertaining experience.
games.instructions: Tap the screen to propel your ghost Align the ghosts color with the barriers to progress Begin with basic challenges and advance to harder stages Mistakes mean starting over Helpful hint Prioritize timing to gradually master the gameplay

games.name: CarRunner
games.description: It is very important to control the safe turning of a car on the road and grasp the right timing. If the timing is wrong, it is very easy to hit the rocks by the roadside and fail. You can get coin rewards during the cars movement. The coins can be used to purchase other exquisite cars. Come and give it a try. Its very exciting and fun.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: PopPopPop
games.description: Control the ball safely to the end. There will be many roads on the way to the end, and the ball needs to be timed to safely enter each road.Come and experience it.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
